projectDescription: Developer Collaboration Platform - Social media for developers to find projects and team members

criticalBugs.title: Request Management Endpoint Mismatch
criticalBugs.description: The requests page fetches connection requests from '/connection/getMyRequests' endpoint but manages them via '/project/request/{id}/{type}' endpoint. This causes connection requests and project requests to be mixed up and non-functional.
criticalBugs.currentCode:
const res = await api.get('/connection/getMyRequests')
// Line 29: const result = await api.patch(`/project/request/${id}/${type}`)
criticalBugs.impact: Connection requests cannot be properly accepted or rejected. Users cannot manage incoming connection requests.
criticalBugs.rootCause: Inconsistent API endpoint usage across the component
criticalBugs.recommendedFix: Use consistent endpoints: '/connection/request/{id}/{type}' for both fetching and managing connection requests

criticalBugs.title: User Data Structure Bug in Project View
criticalBugs.description: The isOwner check uses 'user.user._id' path but the useAuth hook returns user object directly with _id property. This causes undefined reference errors and prevents owners from seeing edit/delete options.
criticalBugs.impact: Project owners cannot see or access edit/delete buttons for their own projects. Undefined reference in console.
criticalBugs.rootCause: Incorrect understanding of AuthContext return value structure
criticalBugs.recommendedFix: Change 'user?.user?._id' to 'user?._id' since useAuth returns user directly

criticalBugs.title: No Error Response Status Codes
criticalBugs.description: Multiple error handlers don't set proper HTTP status codes. Some responses don't send any status code, making it impossible for the frontend to detect whether a request succeeded or failed.
examples: Some catch blocks only console.log without responding
criticalBugs.impact: Frontend cannot properly detect failed requests. No proper error UI feedback. Failed requests not logged properly. Network tab shows 200 for failed requests.
criticalBugs.recommendedFix: Always use res.status(code).json(message). Use: 404 for not found, 400 for bad request, 500 for server error, 401 for unauthorized, 403 for forbidden

criticalBugs.title: Missing Redirect After Successful Login
criticalBugs.description: After successful login, users are not redirected to the home or dashboard page. They stay on the login page.
criticalBugs.impact: Users stay on login page even after successful authentication. Poor user experience. Confusion about login success.
criticalBugs.rootCause: Missing router.push() call after successful login
criticalBugs.recommendedFix: Add router.push('/') after successful login response

mediumBugs.title: Missing Request Status Handling
mediumBugs.description: RequestStatus is fetched from server but when it returns {status: null}, the UI doesn't handle this case properly

mediumBugs.title: No Input Validation in Forms
mediumBugs.description: Project creation form allows submission with empty fields

mediumBugs.title: Missing Loading States
mediumBugs.description: Pages don't show loading indicators while fetching data

mediumBugs.title: No User Interaction on Profile
mediumBugs.description: Profile page displays user info but has no Connect button or action buttons

mediumBugs.title: Unhandled Promise in useEffect
mediumBugs.description: fetchUser doesn't handle loading state properly before initial render

mediumBugs.title: Missing Error Boundaries
mediumBugs.description: No error boundary component to catch React errors

mediumBugs.title: No Toast for Success Messages
mediumBugs.description: Request acceptance/rejection doesn't show success feedback to user

lowBugs.title: Console.log Statements in Production
lowBugs.description: Multiple console.log statements left throughout codebase

lowBugs.title: Inconsistent Error Logging
lowBugs.description: Some use console.log(), others use console.error()

lowBugs.title: No Environment Variable Validation
lowBugs.description: Server doesn't validate required env vars at startup

highPriority.name: Edit Project

highPriority.name: Delete Project

highPriority.description: Users cannot update their bio, skills, contact links

highPriority.description: Cannot search for specific users by username or skills

highPriority.name: Project Search
highPriority.description: Cannot filter projects by name, tags, or tech stack

highPriority.name: Email Verification
highPriority.description: No email verification for new accounts

mediumPriority.name: Real-time Notifications
mediumPriority.description: Socket.io is installed but not implemented. Notifications don't update in real-time.

mediumPriority.name: Project Comments/Discussion
mediumPriority.description: No way for team members to discuss in project

mediumPriority.name: User Blocking
requiredComponents: Blocked users list in User model

mediumPriority.name: Pagination
mediumPriority.description: No pagination for large datasets. All data loads at once.

mediumPriority.name: Sorting Options
mediumPriority.description: Cannot sort by date, popularity, followers, etc.

mediumPriority.name: Activity Feed
mediumPriority.description: No user activity timeline showing connections, projects, etc.

mediumPriority.name: Admin Dashboard
mediumPriority.description: No admin panel for managing users and projects

errorHandling: Add try-catch in all API calls
database: Add indexes on frequently queried fields (email, userName, project owner)
testing: E2E tests for critical user flows
codeOrganization: Create service layer for complex operations

phase1.name: Critical Fixes
tasks: Fix endpoint mismatch in requests page
Fix user data structure bug in project view
Add proper error status codes to all endpoints
